---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

<!-- TODO: drop your CV PDF into the assets/ folder as `assets/cv.pdf`.
     The button and embedded viewer below will pick it up automatically. -->

[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download CV (PDF)](assets/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

<br>

```{=html}
<object data="assets/cv.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="900px"
        style="border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:8px;">
  <p>Your browser can't display the embedded PDF.
     <a href="assets/cv.pdf">Download it here</a>.</p>
</object>
```
